seoTitle: Currajong vs Curramore — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Currajong and Curramore. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Currajong and Curramore.
heading: Currajong vs Curramore — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Currajong, Queensland and Curramore, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Currajong has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Curramore (29/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Currajong or Curramore safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Currajong has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Curramore scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Currajong scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Curramore scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Currajong or Curramore?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Currajong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
